warnings: MET observation only. AEX owns admission. PQX owns execution. EVL owns eval. CDE owns control. SEL owns enforcement.

The dashboard implementation (AI Programming Governed Path panel) was a Claude-driven repo-mutating work item that predates the AEX intake and PQX execution instrumentation requirements, creating a self-referential bootstrap gap.
This record does NOT claim that AEX admitted or PQX executed this work item. It explicitly records that both legs are missing and cannot be silently inferred.
